description: Manages calendar operations (view schedule, create events, reschedule, check availability) through browser-based interaction with Google Calendar, Outlook, or other web calendar systems.

steps_hint: Snapshot current schedule to understand availability
Create or modify events by interacting with UI elements
Confirm event details and send invitations
use_cases: 採用面接のスケジュール管理
予定の作成・変更・キャンセル
hints._comment: Pattern B: Initial calendar login requires human authentication, then subsequent schedule operations are automated via browser interaction.
